features.name: enum bit width type as module input
features.description: Code should include an enum with explicit bit width used as a module input port type

features.name: struct packed with enum tag and union packed body
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing an enum tag field and a packed union body for tagged union pattern

features.name: enum member comparison in ternary chain
features.description: Code should include chained ternary operators using enum member comparisons for conditional logic
features.snippet: assign result = opcode == add ? arg0 + arg1 : opcode == sub ? arg0 - arg1 : arg0 * arg1;

features.name: enum with minimal bit width for variant count
features.description: Code should include an enum declaration where bit width is minimal for the number of variants (bit [0:0] for 2 variants)
